title: Tickets App
quote: "High-efficiency real-time flow architecture. The ecosystem bridges React 19 with native WebSockets and a Bun/TypeScript backend for instant reactivity."
challenges: Zero-latency multi-client synchronization of global queue state using binary/JSON protocols over WebSockets.
Implementation of dynamic prioritization logic (Normal vs Preferential) ensuring integrity in concurrent environments.
Designing a robust exponential backoff reconnection infrastructure for critical clients (Kiosks and Board screens).
solutions: Leveraging Bun.serve for high-performance native WebSockets and Zod schemas for strict message validation at the edge.
Abstraction of domain logic through custom Hooks (useSocketTicket) and Context API for clean state management.
Decoupled and containerized architecture with Docker for consistent deployments and immediate horizontal scalability.
imageAlt: Modern brutalist skyscraper facade with sharp angles and dramatic shadows at dusk
